issues.sample: The dashboard has pulled away from the windshield and is rippling. If it continues it will obstruct my view.  I think it would affect the airbags as well. I've seen another 640 with this same problem at the store. I am available for inspection, I also attached BMWs invoice to sho

narrative.headline: What 2016 Bmw 6 Series owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Structure (100% of reports).
